---
created: "2026-03-22T00:00:00Z"
id: task-sv0doc-extract-type-rules
key: sv0doc-extract-type-rules
state: done
tags:
    - sv0
    - sv0doc
    - types
title: "extract type system rules"
type: task
---

# extract type system rules

## purpose

extract the type system rules from the sv0 design document into a formal
specification at `sv0doc/type-system/rules.md`. this specification drives
the implementation of sv0c's type checker.

## dependencies

/require: bash

## configuration

/env: SV0DOC_ROOT=sv0doc
/env: TYPE_RULES_FILE=$SV0DOC_ROOT/type-system/rules.md

## extraction

/ai: extract the complete type system rules from the sv0 design document.

     organize into these sections:

     1. primitive types
        - integer types (i8-i128, u8-u128), floating point (f32, f64)
        - bool, char, byte, string
        - widening/narrowing cast rules with contract implications

     2. composite types
        - arrays [T; N], slices &[T], tuples (T1, T2, ...)
        - structs (product types), enums (sum types)
        - Option<T>, Result<T, E>
        - type aliases, newtypes, refined types (type T = U where ...)

     3. reference types
        - &T (shared reference), &mut T (exclusive reference)
        - raw pointers *const T, *mut T
        - function pointers fn(A) -> B

     4. type inference
        - local variable inference (let x = expr)
        - closure parameter inference in known contexts
        - explicit annotation required at function boundaries

     5. generics
        - type parameters <T: Trait>
        - associated types (type Output)
        - where clauses for trait bounds
        - monomorphization strategy

     6. trait system
        - trait definition with contracts
        - impl blocks (inherent and trait)
        - trait resolution rules
        - impl coherence (orphan rules)
        - operator trait desugaring

     7. function overloading
        - resolution by argument types
        - ambiguity detection
        - interaction with generics

     8. auto-derivation
        - Copy: auto-derived when all fields are Copy
        - Clone: implied by Copy
        - Send/Sync: inferred from field types
        - negative impls (impl !Send for T)

     write the complete specification to sv0doc/type-system/rules.md.

/run: 01-validate-type-rules.sh

## validation

/assert: test -f $TYPE_RULES_FILE
/assert: test -s $TYPE_RULES_FILE
